languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

languages.text: "И что бы мы делали без ищейки с таким потрясающим чутьем? Ах да, были бы избавлены от бесценной возможности оценить примитивность твоего мышления".
"And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."
languages.original_text: "И что бы мы делали без ищейки с таким потрясающим чутьем? Ах да, были бы избавлены от бесценной возможности оценить примитивность твоего мышления".

traits.locale_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."
"And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."
"And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

languages.text: 「そして、そんな驚くべき本能を持つ犬がいなければ、私たちは一体何をすべきでしょうか。ああ、そうです、あなたの思考の原始性を評価するかけがえのない機会を逃れることでしょう」
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、そんな驚くべき本能を持つ血houndがいなければ、私たちは一体何をすべきでしょうか。ああ、そうです、あなたの思考の原始性を評価するかけがえのない機会を逃れることでしょう。」

languages.text: « Que ferions-nous sans un cerbère à l'instinct aussi remarquable ? À part manquer cette chance inouïe de nous ébahir devant votre esprit primitif. »
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: « Que ferions-nous sans un cerbère à l'instinct aussi remarquable ? À part manquer cette chance inouïe de nous ébahir devant votre esprit primitif. »

languages.text: "Und was täten wir ohne einen Bluthund mit derart bemerkenswerten Instinkten? Oh, ja, uns würde die unbezahlbare Gelegenheit entgehen, Einblicke in Eure primitiven Gedankengänge zu erhalten."
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: "Und was täten wir ohne einen Bluthund mit derart bemerkenswerten Instinkten? Oh, ja, uns würde die unbezahlbare Gelegenheit entgehen, Einblicke in Eure primitiven Gedankengänge zu erhalten."

languages.text: "Böylesine şaşırtıcı içgüdülere sahip bir kan tazısı olmasaydı ne yapardık? Doğru ya, düşüncenizin ilkeliliğini takdir etme gibi paha biçilmez bir fırsattan mahrum kalırdık."
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: "Böylesine şaşırtıcı içgüdülere sahip bir kan tazısı olmasaydı ne yapardık? Doğru ya, düşüncenizin ilkeliliğini takdir etme gibi paha biçilmez bir fırsattan mahrum kalırdık."

languages.text: «¿Y qué sería de nosotros sin un sabueso con un instinto tan afinado? Ah, claro, nos perderíamos la impagable oportunidad de deleitarnos con tu primitiva mentalidad».
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y qué sería de nosotros sin un sabueso con un instinto tan afinado? Ah, claro, nos perderíamos la impagable oportunidad de deleitarnos con tu primitiva mentalidad».

languages.text: “要是少了您这位嗅觉惊人的‘猎犬’，我们可怎么办呢？那我们可就无缘领略您那原始的思维了。”
languages.original_text: "And what would we do without a bloodhound with such amazing instincts? Oh yes, we'd be spared the priceless opportunity to appreciate the primitiveness of your thinking."

traits.locale_text: “要是少了您这位嗅觉惊人的‘猎犬’，我们可怎么办呢？那我们可就无缘领略您那原始的思维了。”
